summary: tell me about the different parts of this diff:

prompt.text:
tell me about the different parts of this diff: 

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 51e09a6..05299bd 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -13,6 +13,8 @@ Minimal Rust skeleton for an AI-native Git/JJ porcelain wrapper.
 Run `gg init` once per repo to configure git notes/refs and co-author identity.
 It will prompt for a co-author name unless you pass `--coauthor` or
 `--no-coauthor`.
+You can also set default output behavior with `--git-stdout`/`--no-git-stdout`
+and `--compact`/`--no-compact` (stored in `gg.git-stdout` and `gg.compact`).

 ## Output customization
 Colors and spinner behavior can be configured via environment variables:
@@ -23,6 +25,8 @@ Colors and spinner behavior can be configured via environment variables:
 - `GG_COLOR_HASH` (default: yellow)
 - `GG_COLOR_DIM` (default: dim/no color)
 - Use `--compact` for a one-line summary (Pretty Mode is default).
+- `gg init --git-stdout` and `gg init --compact` set repo defaults.
+- Use `--no-git-stdout` or `--no-compact` to disable those defaults.

 Supported color names: black, red, green, yellow, blue, magenta, cyan, white,
 brightblack/gray, brightred, brightgreen, brightyellow, brightblue,
@@ -33,6 +37,8 @@ brightmagenta, brightcyan, brightwhite. Use `none` to disable a color.
 gg init
 gg session event --session ses_123 --summary "Add tests" --path src/lib.rs
 gg session event --session ses_123 --summary "Fix bug" --tokens-in 1200 --tokens-out 250 --tool-token bash:30:10:system --git-stdout --compact
+gg summary --session-id ses_123
+gg sessions
 ```

 ## Joke
(END)

response.text:
This diff shows two added blocks in `README.md`, plus the standard diff metadata.

What each part means:
- `diff --git a/README.md b/README.md`: file being compared (old vs new).
- `index 51e09a6..05299bd 100644`: old/new blob hashes and file mode.
- `--- a/README.md` / `+++ b/README.md`: old and new file labels.
- `@@ -13,6 +13,8 @@`: hunk header; in the old file starting at line 13 with 6 lines of context, in the new file starting at line 13 with 8 lines (because 2 lines were added).

Content changes:
- At the top section, two lines were added explaining `gg init` defaults:
  - `--git-stdout`/`--no-git-stdout` and `--compact`/`--no-compact`
  - Notes those defaults are stored in `gg.git-stdout` and `gg.compact`.
- In “Output customization”, two lines were added explaining:
  - `gg init --git-stdout` and `gg init --compact` set repo defaults.
  - `--no-git-stdout` and `--no-compact` disable those defaults.
- In the example commands block, two new commands were added:
  - `gg summary --session-id ses_123`
  - `gg sessions`

Net effect: only documentation additions, no removals.

meta.session_title: Diff parts and new defaults in README.md for gg init, git-stdout, compact
